headline: Elon Musk Reveals The Biggest Benefit Of AI Replacing Human Jobs: 'In A Benign Scenario ...'
summary: Billionaire entrepreneur Elon Musk says that artificial intelligence will eventually eliminate the need for human labor.

headline: 'Hunger Games' In Real Life? Content Creator Planning 'First Fully Professionally Organized Live' Version Of Popular Book And Movie Franchise
summary: A real-life version of "The Hunger Games" could pit 50 content creators against each other.

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Nvidia, GameStop, Ethereum And Crypto Analyst Predicts Dogecoin Will Hit 22 Cents In Days
summary: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors’ favorite stocks over the last week — here’s a look at some of our top stories.

headline: Barack Obama: The First US Muslim President? Google's AI Overview Faces Backlash For Describing Ex-President As Such
summary: Google's new AI Overviews feature, recently rolled out in the U.S., is facing backlash for generating bizarre and inaccurate responses, including calling Barack Obama the first Muslim President and suggesting glue to prevent cheese from falling off pizza.

headline: Elon Musk Takes on Mark Zuckerberg-Led Meta's Data Security Practices: 'WhatsApp Exports Your User Data Every Night'
summary: Tesla Inc. CEO Elon Musk has raised concerns about the security of user data on Meta Platforms Inc.'s WhatsApp, a popular messaging app.

headline: Apple's iPhone AI Moment 'Now Here For Cook,' Says Tech Bull: Cupertino And Microsoft Set To Hit $4 Trillion Market Capitalization By This Year
summary: Wedbush analyst Dan Ives has predicted that Apple and Microsoft could cross the $4 trillion valuation mark over the next year, driven by AI.
